# JVM Binding — modern-colorthief-jvm

Package: `colorthief.Colorthief`

## API (Java)

```java
import colorthief.Colorthief;

byte[][] palette = Colorthief.getPalette(pixels, width, height, colorCount, quality);
byte[] color = Colorthief.getColor(pixels, width, height, quality);
```

## API (Kotlin)

```kotlin
import colorthief.Colorthief

val palette = Colorthief.getPalette(pixels, width, height, colorCount, quality)
val color = Colorthief.getColor(pixels, width, height, quality)
```

## Parameters

- `pixels`: `byte[]` — raw RGBA pixel data (4 bytes per pixel)
- `width`: `int` — image width
- `height`: `int` — image height
- `colorCount`: `int` — colors to extract
- `quality`: `int` — sampling quality 1-10

## Image Decoding

Use Java AWT `BufferedImage` or TwelveMonkeys imageio for decoding.

Tested against Java 26. Android compatible.
